hero.sub: We support those whose right ideas can transform society.

foundation.h2italic: One mission, two ways to serve.
foundation.body: Fortius Foundation is Fortius's pro bono vehicle. We incubate institutes and organisations, train leaders, fund research and develop programmes to advance civic engagement and social impact.
foundation.card-body: We incubate institutes, train leaders, fund research and develop programmes to advance civic engagement and social impact.

newsletter.h2: Useful ideas to make better decisions.
newsletter.sub: Receive analysis, readings and relevant signals for organisations with a vocation for impact. No noise, just sound editorial judgement.
newsletter.error: We could not complete your subscription. Please try again.

contact.sub: We respond within 48 hours with a first strategic read and the right member of our team for your case.
contact.form-intro: All enquiries are registered in our central channel and assigned to the right area within 48 hours.
contact.name: Full name
contact.message-placeholder: Tell us briefly about the challenge, the context and what you need from Fortius.
contact.error: We could not register your message. Please try again.
contact.offices-sub: We serve projects across Europe, Latin America, the United States and North Africa.
contact.commitment-text: All conversations with Fortius are confidential by default. If the case requires it, we sign an NDA before any detailed briefing.

nosotros.sub: Strategists, analysts and specialists in public affairs, political intelligence, technology and law. United by a single standard: rigour, discretion and commitment to the values we defend.
nosotros.philosophy-h2pre: Ideas only transform reality when they find people and institutions capable of defending them with
nosotros.philosophy-p1: Fortius exists to help those people and institutions turn conviction into structure, influence and impact.
nosotros.philosophy-p2pre: Because serving a noble cause requires more than conviction.
nosotros.founder-bio1: Juan Ángel Soto Gómez is founder and CEO of Fortius. His career combines directing think tanks, civic entrepreneurship, teaching and strategic consulting in complex institutional environments.
nosotros.founder-bio2: On his personal page you will find a more complete picture of his academic, executive and institutional background.
nosotros.history-h2pre: More than a decade supporting organizations and institutions in
nosotros.history-p: Throughout this time we have worked alongside think tanks, foundations, political leaders, international institutions, and civic platforms in some of the most complex political and institutional environments across the Euro-Atlantic space.
nosotros.work-h2pre: Operating in the most complex social, political and institutional environments
nosotros.allies-title: Institutions, networks and organisations with which Fortius has worked or collaborated.
nosotros.allies-desc: This network of partners reflects part of the institutional and professional ecosystem in which we operate.

sociedad-civil.meta-desc: We support foundations, think tanks, associations and civic platforms to turn conviction into structure, influence and impact.
sociedad-civil.work-title: The context and insight you need to decide well
sociedad-civil.portfolio-title: Nine services to build, professionalise and scale.
sociedad-civil.portfolio-desc: We cover the full cycle: from organisational design to operational execution, without diluting strategic rigour.
sociedad-civil.membership-desc: Access to the Private Area and tools, knowledge and community. For organisations with a vocation for impact. Two plans designed for different levels of demand and depth.
sociedad-civil.access-desc: Log in or request access to access all your benefits and consult exclusive reports and notes.

politica.meta-desc: Political intelligence and geopolitical risk analysis for leaders who take responsibility for deciding and serving.
politica.subverticals-title: Two complementary lenses for high-impact decisions.
politica.work-title: The context and insight you need to decide well
politica.portfolio-title: Six services to anticipate, interpret and decide.
politica.portfolio-desc: From legislative monitoring to geopolitical scenario analysis: comprehensive coverage for high-complexity environments.
politica.membership-desc: Access to the Private Area and tools, knowledge and community. For organisations with a vocation for impact. Two plans designed for different levels of demand and depth.
politica.access-desc: Log in or request access to access all your benefits and consult exclusive reports and notes.

login.activated-ok: ✓ Account activated. Log in to access your private area.

nueva-contrasena.page-subtitle: Choose a strong password of at least 8 characters
nueva-contrasena.invalid: The link has expired or is invalid. Request a new one.
nueva-contrasena.error-short: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
nueva-contrasena.error-update: Could not update the password. Request a new link.

recuperar.page-subtitle: We will send you a link to create a new password
recuperar.sent-body: If your email is registered, you will receive a password reset link within the next few minutes. Check your spam folder too.

publicaciones.meta-desc: Complete archive of articles, reports, notes and news from Fortius Consulting on Civil Society and Policy.
publicaciones.desc-pre: All articles, reports and news from Fortius Consulting. Content marked with
publicaciones.desc-post: shows a preview and a members-only notice.

article.subproduct-fallback: Available to clients in the Member Area.
article.access-locked: Content unlocked in the Member Area.
article.paywall-title-event: This opportunity is reserved for Fortius clients.
article.paywall-title: The full {kind} is reserved for Fortius clients.
article.paywall-desc-event: Access the full event details, available packages and management from the Member Area under Opportunities & Events in {category}.
article.paywall-desc: Access the complete content, linked deliverables and the full {category} library from the Member Area.
article.event-purchase-desc: Payment is processed securely via Stripe. After confirmation, you will receive an email and the opportunity will appear in your Member Area.
article.event-purchased-desc: This opportunity is already linked to your profile. You can also view it from the Member Area.
article.event-client-desc: This opportunity includes participation packages, coordinated agenda and Fortius support. Full details are unlocked from the Member Area under Opportunities & Events.
article.event-pkg-fallback: Check the document body for full package details and conditions.

fundacion-page.meta-desc: Leadership training with values, applied research and scholarship programmes. The same principles, another vehicle for impact.
fundacion-page.body: Fortius Foundation is the non-profit arm of the ecosystem. Where the consultancy accompanies, the foundation
fundacion-page.body-post: so that strong societies do not depend solely on those who can afford it.
fundacion-page.pillar1-desc: Programmes to strengthen knowledge of the institutional framework and the values of free societies.
fundacion-page.pillar2-desc: Fellowships and intensive courses to prepare the next generation of decision-makers with sound judgement.
fundacion-page.pillar3-desc: Independent studies that provide evidence for public debate on the issues that matter.
fundacion-page.pillar4-desc: We support talented individuals who, due to limited resources, could not otherwise access our flagship programmes.

suscripcion.stripe-desc: Payment and subscription management will take place on Stripe, where you will be asked for your billing and payment details.
suscripcion.monthly-desc: Ideal if you prefer to start with a monthly recurring fee.
suscripcion.annual-desc: Ideal if you prefer to settle the subscription for the full year from the outset.
suscripcion.support-pre: If you need access coordination, an invoice or commercial support, you can write to us via
suscripcion.access-note: Access to the Private Area is still being connected to the subscription system. For now, the financial sign-up can be completed on Stripe in a real and secure way.
suscripcion.error-checkout: Could not open the checkout. Check the price configuration on Stripe or write to us via Contact.
suscripcion.confirmed-logged: Your membership is now active. Access the private area to view your subscription and available resources.
suscripcion.confirmed-guest: Your payment has been processed. We have sent you an invitation email: open it and follow the link to create your password and access the private area.
suscripcion.confirmed-spam: If you don't receive it within a few minutes, check your spam folder. If you have already created your password, log in directly.
suscripcion.cancelled-body: No charge has been made. If you would like, you can try again or write to us and we will help you complete the sign-up.

expert.bio-extra: With an extensive track record in complex environments, his work has focused on the intersection of public policy, strategic decision-making and the construction of institutional alliances. He has advised leaders in the private sector and internationally focused foundations.
expert.contact-desc: Contact directly to request advisory services, participation in events or access to intelligence reports.
expert.archive-desc: Memoirs, past research and archived papers.

juan-soto.meta-desc: Founder & CEO of Fortius. Academic, executive and institutional background of Juan Ángel Soto Gómez.
juan-soto.subtitle: Personal page
juan-soto.bio2: His work sits at the intersection of institutional strategy, think tanks, political intelligence and the construction of civic initiatives with an international vocation.
juan-soto.education-1: Bachelor's in Business Administration and Law, University of Navarra.
juan-soto.education-2: Bachelor's in Political Science and Public Administration, UNED.
juan-soto.education-3: Master's in Political and Legal Theory, University College London (UCL).
juan-soto.education-4: PhD candidate in Political Science, St. Mary's University London.
juan-soto.executive-1: Founder & CEO of Fortius, a strategic consulting firm active across Europe, the Americas and Africa.
juan-soto.institutions-1: President of Fundación Fortius y Principios.
juan-soto.institutions-2: Founder of the Instituto Español de Análisis Migratorio and Escuela Hispánica.
juan-soto.institutions-3: Lecturer in Political Theory at the University of Navarra.
juan-soto.institutions-4: Visiting Fellow at the Danube Institute and Ludovika University.
juan-soto.work-areas-p1: Juan Ángel Soto supports organisations and leaders who need strategic insight, institutional architecture and a sharper reading of the political and cultural landscape.
juan-soto.work-areas-p2: His work combines leadership, institutional design, public engagement, project development and network-building in Spain, Europe and the transatlantic space.
juan-soto.contact-desc: Request a conversation for strategic consulting, conferences, teaching or institutional collaboration.
